description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a deer, featuring a robust body covered in a uniform brown coloration. The deer has a prominent set of large, branching antlers that extend upward and outward from its head, giving it a majestic appearance. Its legs are slender and proportionate, with visible hooves at the ends, and the tail is short and subtle. The head is elongated with a gentle slope from the forehead to the nose, and the ears are pointed and upright, positioned symmetrically on either side of the head. The surface texture appears matte and slightly rough, mimicking the look of a natural animal hide. Overall, the form and anatomical details suggest a mature male deer, likely intended to evoke a lifelike presence in an urban or park setting.
description: A lifelike brown deer with large branching antlers, pointed upright ears, and a short tail, standing in a natural pose. The surface is matte and slightly rough, resembling animal hide.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full body profile, large antlers, and pointed ears; legs and short tail are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back, tail, and the symmetry of the antlers; only one leg and the back of the head are visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the head turned slightly, showing the antlers from a different angle and the full length of the body.
description_view_3: Front angled view emphasizing the face, antlers, and upright ears; both front legs are visible.
